message:
fix(install): use fixed lock file path for concurrent install protection

Remove $$ (PID) from LOCK_FILE path. Using PID meant each installer
instance got a unique lock file, completely defeating the purpose of
preventing concurrent installations.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ FROM_SOURCE=0
 CHECKSUM="${CHECKSUM:-}"
 CHECKSUM_URL="${CHECKSUM_URL:-}"
 ARTIFACT_URL="${ARTIFACT_URL:-}"
-LOCK_FILE="/tmp/cass-memory-install.$$.lock"
+LOCK_FILE="/tmp/cass-memory-install.lock"
 SYSTEM=0
 
 log() { [ "$QUIET" -eq 1 ] && return 0; echo -e "$@"; }
